name: ai-bench
description: Standalone AI inference benchmarker with Google Sheets sync

scripts.build:mac: node scripts/build.mjs && npx @yao-pkg/pkg dist/bundle.cjs --targets node22-macos-x64 --output dist/ai-bench-mac    --config pkg.config.json
scripts.build:linux: node scripts/build.mjs && npx @yao-pkg/pkg dist/bundle.cjs --targets node22-linux-x64 --output dist/ai-bench-linux  --config pkg.config.json
